dashboardIntro: Use this console to update placeholder editorial content, artwork, colours, and fonts, then rebuild the static site.
publishChecklist: Replace the placeholder contact details, legal copy, and launch notes
Decide the real section names, publishing rhythm, and editorial ownership
Upload final photography, commissioned illustration, or archive artwork
Review theological, editorial, safeguarding, and data responsibilities before launch
systemNotes: The public website stays static. Saving content rewrites JSON files and regenerates dist automatically.
